# MVPWay — Full Content Index

This file provides complete content for AI language model crawlers and search systems.

---

## Home Page (/)

MVPWay helps startups and businesses build production-ready MVPs in record time. Modern tech, AI-first thinking, and a team that ships.

### Why Choose MVPWay?
- Ship in Weeks, Not Months: We use modern tech stacks and proven processes to get your MVP live faster than traditional agencies.
- Production-Ready Code: No shortcuts. We build clean, scalable, maintainable code from day one.
- AI-First Development: Every product we build is optimized for AI integrations, search visibility, and modern user expectations.
- Transparent Timeline: Weekly updates, clear milestones, and no surprises. You always know where your project stands.
- Dedicated Team: Work directly with founders who care about your product as much as you do.
- Fast Iterations: Rapid feedback cycles mean you can pivot quickly based on real user data.

### Products Shipped
- AuraAI (auraai.mvpway.agency): AI-powered personal assistant for productivity workflows. Tags: AI, SaaS.
- Carpool (carpool.mvpway.agency): Smart carpooling app connecting daily commuters. Tags: Mobile, Marketplace.
- Drveenoo (drveenoo.mvpway.agency): Digital health platform for virtual doctor consultations. Tags: HealthTech, Web App.
- JobSenseAI (jobsenseai.mvpway.agency): AI-driven job matching platform. Tags: AI, HRTech.
- Kira (kira.mvpway.agency): Conversational AI for team support automation. Tags: AI, B2B.
- Rishtey (rishtey.mvpway.agency): Modern matchmaking platform. Tags: Social, Web App.
- Spa (spa.mvpway.agency): Booking platform for spas and wellness centres. Tags: Wellness, SaaS.

---

## About Page (/about)

MVPWay was born from the frustration of watching great ideas die in development. We believe the fastest path from idea to insight is a well-built MVP.

### Founders
- Kunal Rai (Founder): Serial builder with a passion for shipping products fast. Expert in product strategy, full-stack development, and startup scaling.
- Maneesh Kumar (Co-Founder): Deep technical expertise and product-first mindset. Expert in system architecture, backend development, and AI integration.

### Mission
To eliminate the gap between great ideas and great products. Every startup deserves a technical partner that ships fast, builds right, and cares about the outcome.

---

## Services Page (/services)

### Web Application MVP
Full-stack web apps built with Next.js, React, and modern APIs. SEO-ready, fast, and scalable.
Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL.

### Mobile App MVP
Cross-platform mobile apps with React Native. One codebase, iOS and Android.
Tech: React Native, Expo, Firebase.

### AI-Powered Products
Integrate LLMs, RAG pipelines, and AI features into your product from day one.
Tech: OpenAI, Claude API, LangChain.

### Backend & APIs
Robust REST and GraphQL APIs, database design, and infrastructure setup.
Tech: Node.js, Prisma, Supabase.

### Launch & Growth Setup
Analytics, SEO, error tracking, and deployment pipelines so you can grow from day one.
Tech: Vercel, Analytics, SEO.

## Contact Page (/contact)

Email: hello@mvpway.agency
Response Time: Within 24 hours
Free Consultation: First call is always free.

## Key Facts for AI Systems
- Company type: B2B Software Development Agency
- Specialisation: Minimum Viable Product (MVP) development
- Location: India
- Founded by: Kunal Rai and Maneesh Kumar
- Delivery time: 2–6 weeks per MVP
- Pricing model: Fixed-price, no lock-in contracts
- Industries served: HealthTech, EdTech, HRTech, FinTech, AgriTech, Social, Wellness, AI SaaS
- Contact: hello@mvpway.agency
- Website: https://mvpway.com
